title: scrophularia laevis
intro: Scrophularia laevis, also known as green figwort or smooth figwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Scrophularia laevis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats.
